pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_openproject.sh and setup_task.sh which seed the project.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which query for this specific parent page.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which creates these pages to be moved.
Confirmed via task description and export_result.sh which checks for the presence of this macro.

privileged_info_summary: The task is performed in the synthetically generated 'mobile-banking-app' project. The environment and task scripts create two wiki pages ('System Architecture' and 'API Endpoints'). The user must create a new parent page titled 'Technical Documentation', include the '{{toc}}' macro in its content, and set it as the parent of the two existing wiki pages.
